sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10504" key="a)ntispoudi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντισπουδία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10504.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">opposite exertion,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Oenom.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:5:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
